steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage ends with an incomplete sentence: mountain climbers presented edelweiss this way “in order to ______”. The answer must explain their self-interested motive — Scheidegger says they personally benefited from portraying edelweiss as dangerous and hard to reach.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘share observations with scientists’: sharing data with scientists benefits scientists, not the climbers themselves. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘encourage flower enthusiasts to explore’: bringing more visitors to the Alps benefits others, not the climbers personally. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘make themselves appear brave and strong’: by claiming edelweiss grew only in steep, icy, dangerous terrain and then reaching them, the climbers could present themselves as exceptionally courageous — a direct personal, self-interested gain. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘prove edelweiss were more common in the Alps’: proving flower distribution is unrelated to any personal benefit for the climbers. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
